category_sources: source_facts.description says JavaScript bindings for GNOME; official GJS docs describe JavaScript bindings for GNOME platform APIs powered by SpiderMonkey.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gjs; official GJS documentation uses the display name GJS.
docs_sources: Official GJS documentation site provides API/topic documentation; the GJS docs page points readers to the GJS Guide for tutorials and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the GNOME GitLab wiki for gjs; GNOME wiki/search results state Gjs migrated to GitLab at GNOME/gjs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNOME JavaScript bindings; official GJS docs mention GNOME platform APIs, GTK, GObject Introspection, and SpiderMonkey.
